project_type: TypeScript monorepo (pnpm workspace + turborepo) - multi-app platform
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + turbo. Node 22 required (source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 before any pnpm commands)
test_framework: vitest (v2) with standard describe/it/expect pattern. Tests live in src/__tests__/ within each package.
build_command: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && pnpm --filter @quant/quant-tools typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/quant-codex typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/quant-automate typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/voice-first-os typecheck
test_command: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && pnpm --filter @quant/quant-tools test && pnpm --filter @quant/quant-codex test && pnpm --filter @quant/quant-automate test && pnpm --filter @quant/voice-first-os test
verification_instructions: 1. nvm use 22, 2. pnpm install, 3. pnpm --filter <pkg> typecheck, 4. pnpm --filter <pkg> test
setup_instructions: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm install
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. Node 22 via nvm. No Docker build needed. pnpm workspaces with workspace: protocol deps.
contribution_requirements: Each package uses workspace:* protocol for internal deps. Tests use vitest. All packages are ESM (type: module). Import paths use .js extension.
key_patterns: - Tool definitions follow ToolDefinition interface in quant-tools/src/types.ts (id, appId, name, inputSchema, outputSchema, permissionTier, costEstimate, tags). - IntentRouter takes ToolDefinition[] in constructor. - MultiStepPlanner.plan(intent, tools) returns ToolPlan. - ToolExecutor.execute(plan, context) runs plan sequentially, stops on failure. - MCPServerAdapter takes tools[] and executor, exposes getCatalog() and handleRequest(). - DurableExecutor: start(), checkpoint(), resume(). - NLAutomationBuilder.parse(description) returns Automation. - PhoneFreeController: activate(), getContextualResponse(app, query), getSessionSummary(). - CodexVoiceInterface: parseCommand(input), execute(command).
directory_structure: packages/quant-tools/ - Universal tool layer (registry, executor, planner, MCP, audit, undo, 17 tool files). packages/quant-codex/ - Voice-to-code builder (scaffolder, orchestrator, deploy). packages/quant-automate/ - Automation engine (triggers, durable execution, NL builder). packages/voice-first-os/ - Phone-free OS (wake-word, commands, phone-free controller, privacy).
